{"command": "git add projects/news/scripts/collect_global.py projects/news/scripts/global_collectors.py && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(news): add missing imports that broke CI since Apr 12

collect_global.py was missing `import os` and global_collectors.py was
missing `import sys`, causing NameError on every scheduled run.  The
workflow has been silently failing for 13 days.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QdLHypgMm4kaq73jQuVzCm
EOF
)"", "description": "Commit the import fixes"...
